mapper.select: select id, store_market_id, store_owner_id, store_name, store_intro, store_address, store_score, store_state, store_is_confirmed, created_datetime, updated_datetime from tbl_store order by id desc

select s.id, s.store_market_id, s.store_owner_id, s.store_category_id, s.store_name, s.store_intro, s.store_address, s.store_score, s.store_state, s.store_is_confirmed, s.created_datetime, s.updated_datetime, c.category_name as storeCategoryName from tbl_store s left join tbl_category c on s.store_category_id = c.id
order by s.id desc limit #{criteria.count} offset #{criteria.offset}
select distinct store_address from tbl_store where store_address is not null and store_address != '' order by store_address

select s.id, s.store_market_id, s.store_owner_id, s.store_category_id, s.store_name, s.store_intro, s.store_address, s.store_score, s.store_state, s.store_is_confirmed, s.created_datetime, s.updated_datetime, c.category_name as storeCategoryName from tbl_store s left join tbl_category c on s.store_category_id = c.id where s.id = #{id}
mapper.update: update tbl_store set store_name = #{storeName}, store_address = #{storeAddress}, store_state = #{storeState, typeHandler=com.app.haetssal_jangteo.mybatis.handler.StoreStateHandler}, updated_datetime = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
